title: gardenia jasminoides f. simpliciflora
intro: Gardenia jasminoides f. simpliciflora, also known as the Cape Jasmine or Common Gardenia, is a flowering plant species within the Gardenia genus. It is a fragrant evergreen shrub native to China and Southeast Asia, with white, star-shaped flowers and glossy, dark green leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The leaves and flowers of Gardenia jasminoides f. simpliciflora can be prepared as herbal teas or infusions, and are sometimes used in traditional medicine to support digestive health and reduce stress.
